name: 12p13_CD9_SD
description: 12p13.3 segmental duplication interval flanking CD9, TNFRSF1A and ETV6. Short SDs of 5-20 kb predispose to the recurrent ETV6/RUNX1 t(12;21) translocation in childhood B-ALL.

architecture.internal_structure: Small intrachromosomal SDs of 5-20 kb at ~93% identity; ETV6 breakpoint cluster region with Alu-mediated translocation hotspot to RUNX1 on chr21.
